pages.title: Escalations & Reporting

categories.title: AI Tools
categories.description: Guides for each AI content generation tool

pages.title: Email Writer
pages.description: Generate professional emails with AI — cold outreach, follow-ups, introductions, and more with customizable tone and structure

pages.title: Proposal Generator
pages.description: Create professional business proposals with AI — sales, RFP responses, project, and technical proposals with export to PDF and Word

pages.title: Blog Writer
pages.description: Generate SEO-optimized blog posts with AI — from outline to full article with customizable format, tone, and word count

pages.title: Meeting Summarizer
pages.description: Transform meeting transcripts into structured summaries with action items, key decisions, and attendee lists using AI

pages.title: Ad Copy Generator
pages.description: Create platform-optimized ad copy for Google, Meta, LinkedIn, Twitter, TikTok, and Pinterest with character limit validation

pages.title: Social Post Generator
pages.description: Create platform-optimized social media posts for LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram, and TikTok with hashtags and multiple variations
